problem id: e5e3c22b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(5)) AND ROT(1)

examples:
  01110011 -> 01100000
  11000010 -> 00000001
  10101010 -> 01000001
  11110010 -> 01000001
  01110100 -> 10000000
  10101000 -> 00000001
  11111110 -> 11000001
  00100110 -> 01000000

query: 00010101
predicted answer: 00100000
